title: Humanist Project
detail: 8-week clown, Mondays 7–10pm, Houghton Hall, Manhattan, ~$450. Fall 2026 dates not yet posted. Email thehumanistproject.org/contact.

title: Fire Ensemble
detail: Free weekly gospel/R&B choir, BIPOC + queer-centered. Fall session TBD. RSVP at fireensemble.com/choir-form now.

title: Mono No Aware — September
detail: Beginner slate opens: Super 8mm, 16mm Color Neg w/ Bolex, Steenbeck Flatbed. Check mononoawarefilm.com when August ends.

title: MGC printmaking
detail: 322 3rd Ave, Gowanus. Email mgc@powerhousearts.org for fall semester. Sliding scale; membership adds open studio + 25% off.

title: Brooklynite Choir
detail: On waitlist. No audition, no sheet music, learn by ear, ~$22/session. Fall cycle likely opens August.
